title: Eva Duel of the Fates anyone
display_title: Eva Duel of the Fates anyone
wikitext:
[]: Eva Duel of the Fates anyone?             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Mon Jan 02, 2006 9:38 pm I have never seen this but would like to. I have a sick obsession with Eva Opus and if anything can compare I would be greatful. So pease, can anyone give me a way to view this given that it was taken off of the AMV site?

[]: Re: Eva Duel of the Fates anyone?             Quote Post by Digitalex » Mon Jan 02, 2006 10:18 pm rip3mwk wrote: I have never seen this but would like to. I have a sick obsession with Eva Opus and if anything can compare I would be greatful. So pease, can anyone give me a way to view this given that it was taken off of the AMV site?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 02, 2006 11:48 pm I would very much like to upload it to the server for you, but my connection speed currently won't allow it,

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Tue Jan 03, 2006 8:16 am Ask and ye shall receive [url]http://video.google.com/videoplay?docid=-7856439814311738814&q=evangelion[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jan 03, 2006 2:27 pm JESUS CHRIST!!!! THAT IS AMAZING!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Jan 03, 2006 11:16 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: While I don't have the connection speed to watch that, I shudder to think what that re-encode looks like.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Wed Jan 04, 2006 8:02 am rip3mwk wrote: bp32 wrote: Ask and ye shall receive [url]http://video.google.com/videoplay?docid=-7856439814311738814&q=evangelion[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Seele_05 » Wed Jan 04, 2006 11:25 pm "'cause i'm easy COME"-INSERT "THAT" Shinji SCENE HERE- god....that was a little too much

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sun Jan 08, 2006 6:55 am I would love to see the AMV, but im working on a battle of heroes EVA vid..... I love star wars, I love eva....

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Jan 08, 2006 4:10 pm I don't really think that either Duel of the Fates or Battle of the Heroes could really be mixed with Eva. Well, you might get away with Battle of the Heroes with the whole tragedy thing, but I wouldn't think it'd work overly well. Meh.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jan 09, 2006 12:10 pm If it's eva ill watch it. I may not like it but I'll watch it. though if u video.google search evangelion u get this stupid dbz/eva, very horrible i didn't even finish it lol.

Well, you might get away with Battle of the Heroes with the whole tragedy thing, but I wouldn't think it'd work overly well. Meh.
